revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:7 nguŏk 28 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:7月28日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 7월 28일]][[zh-min-nan:7 goe̍h 28 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:七月廿八]][[zh:七月廿八]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:7 nguŏk 28 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:7月28日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 7월 28일]][[zh-min-nan:7 goe̍h 28 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:七月廿八]][[zh:七月廿八]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:7 nguŏk 28 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:7月28日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 7월 28일]][[zh-min-nan:7 goe̍h 28 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:七月廿八]][[zh:七月廿八]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:7 nguŏk 28 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:7月28日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 7월 28일]][[zh-min-nan:7 goe̍h 28 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:七月廿八]][[zh:七月廿八]]
{{Not to be confused with|July 28|qq=July 28}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=七月廿八|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 7월 28일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar July|qq=}} '''July 28''' is the 28th day of month {{ill|July (Lunisolar)|ja|7月 (旧暦)|lt=July (Fumizuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/July (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 7th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Butsumetsu|1=Butsumetsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q10886789}} .
== Events == * Year 5 of {{ill|Jōan (era)|ja|Jōan (era)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jōan (era)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Julian calendar {{ill|August 16|en|August 16|qid=Q2812|lt=August 16|1=August 16}} , {{ill|1175|en|1175|qid=Q19692|lt=1175|1=1175}} ) – The era name was changed from {{ill|Jōan (era)|ja|承安|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jōan (era)|1=Shōan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11076350}} to {{ill|Angen|en|Angen|qid=Q1193287|lt=Angen (era)|1=Angen}} . * Year 2 of {{ill|Keichō|en|Keichō|qid=Q1328185|lt=Juei|1=Keichō}} (Julian calendar {{ill|August 17|en|August 17|qid=Q2827|lt=August 17|1=August 17}} , {{ill|1183|en|1183|qid=Q19723|lt=1183|1=1183}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Go-Shirakawa|1=Emperor Go-Shirakawa|2=ja|3=後白河天皇|qid=Q317984|ja|Emperor Go-Shirakawa|1=Emperor Go-Shirakawa|2=ja|3=後白河天皇|qid=Q317984|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Go-Shirakawa|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} issued an imperial decree for the suppression of the {{ill|Taira clan|ja|平家|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taira clan|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 伊勢平氏}} . * Year 1 of {{ill|Hōtoku|en|Hōtoku|qid=Q1143606|lt=Hōtoku (era)|1=Hōtoku}} (Julian calendar {{ill|August 16|en|August 16|qid=Q2812|lt=August 16|1=August 16}} , {{ill|1449|en|1449|qid=Q6446|lt=1449|1=1449}} ) – The era name was changed from {{ill|Bun'an|en|Bun'an|qid=Q1193586|lt=Bun'an|1=Bun'an}} to {{ill|Hōtoku|en|Hōtoku|qid=Q1143606|lt=Hōtoku (era)|1=Hōtoku}} . * Year 1 of {{ill|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|en|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|qid=Q1145058|lt=Tenshō Era|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)}} (Julian calendar {{ill|August 25|en|August 25|qid=Q2819|lt=August 25|1=August 25}} , {{ill|1573|en|1573|qid=Q6678|lt=1573|1=1573}} ) – Due to war and disasters, the era name was changed from {{ill|Genki (era)|1=Genki (era)|2=ja|3=元亀|qid=Q1145064|lt=Genki Era|ja|Genki (era)|1=Genki (era)|2=ja|3=元亀|qid=Q1145064|lt=Genki Era|Genki|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Genki (era)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q1145064}} to {{ill|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|en|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|qid=Q1145058|lt=Tenshō Era|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)}} . * Year 8 of {{ill|Keichō|en|Keichō|qid=Q1328185|lt=Keichō|1=Keichō}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|September 3|en|September 3|qid=Q2860|lt=September 3|1=September 3}} , {{ill|1603|en|1603|qid=Q6735|lt=1603|1=1603}} ) – {{ill|Senhime|en|Senhime|qid=Q1147080|lt=Senhime|1=Senhime}} , granddaughter of {{ill|Tokugawa Ieyasu|en|Tokugawa Ieyasu|qid=Q171977|lt=Tokugawa Ieyasu|1=Tokugawa Ieyasu}} , married [[Toyotomi Hideyori]]{{efn|Toyotomi Hideyori|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toyotomi Hideyori|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and entered {{ill|Osaka Castle|en|Osaka Castle|qid=Q321242|lt=Osaka Castle|1=Osaka Castle}} . * Year 11 of {{ill|Genroku|1=Genroku|2=ja|3=元禄|qid=Q1325001|ja|Genroku|1=Genroku|2=ja|3=元禄|qid=Q1325001|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Genroku|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q1325001}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|September 2|en|September 2|qid=Q2857|lt=September 2|1=September 2}} , {{ill|1698|en|1698|qid=Q7706|lt=1698|1=1698}} ) – The {{ill|Eitai Bridge|ja|永代橋|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eitai Bridge|1=Eitai Bridge|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11549876}} was built across the {{ill|Sumida River|en|Sumida River|qid=Q222149|lt=Sumida River|1=Sumida River}} .
== Births == * Year 7 of {{ill|Enpō|en|Enpō|qid=Q1145735|lt=Enpō|1=Enpō}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|September 3|en|September 3|qid=Q2860|lt=September 3|1=September 3}} , {{ill|1679|en|1679|qid=Q7638|lt=1679|1=1679}} ) – {{ill|Matsudaira Mototomo|ja|松平基知|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Matsudaira Mototomo|1=Matsudaira Motochika|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11239147}} , 2nd lord of {{ill|Shirakawa Domain|en|Shirakawa Domain|qid=Q1067555|lt=Shirakawa Domain|1=Shirakawa Domain}} (d. {{ill|1729|en|1729|qid=Q6952|lt=1729|1=1729}} ). * Year 2 of {{ill|Tenmei|en|Tenmei|qid=Q1194121|lt=Tenmei|1=Tenmei}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|September 5|en|September 5|qid=Q2854|lt=September 5|1=September 5}} , {{ill|1782|en|1782|qid=Q7740|lt=1782|1=1782}} ) – {{ill|Maeda Narinaga|en|Maeda Narinaga|qid=Q6729104|lt=Maeda Narihiro|1=Maeda Narinaga}} , 12th lord of {{ill|Kaga Domain|ja|Kaga Domain|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaga Domain|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (d. {{ill|1824|en|1824|qid=Q6994|lt=1824|1=1824}} ). * Year 7 of {{ill|Tenpō|en|Tenpō|qid=Q1369045|lt=Tenpō|1=Tenpō}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|September 8|en|September 8|qid=Q2850|lt=September 8|1=September 8}} , {{ill|1836|en|1836|qid=Q7601|lt=1836|1=1836}} ) – {{ill|Takasaki Masakaze|ja|高崎正風|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takasaki Masakaze|1=Takasaki Masakaze|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11669778}} , patriot and lyricist (d. {{ill|1912|en|1912|qid=Q2077|lt=1912|1=1912}} ). * Year 1 of {{ill|Keiō|en|Keiō|qid=Q776775|lt=Keiō|1=Keiō}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|September 17|en|September 17|qid=Q2894|lt=September 17|1=September 17}} , {{ill|1865|en|1865|qid=Q7708|lt=1865|1=1865}} ) – {{ill|Kanō Kōkichi|ja|狩野亨吉|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanō Kōkichi|1=Kanō Kōkichi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11571447}} , educator (d. {{ill|1942|en|1942|qid=Q18625|lt=1942|1=1942}} ).
== Deaths == * Year 1 of {{ill|Jianzhong Jingguo|zh|建中靖国|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jianzhong Jingguo|qq=}} (Julian calendar {{ill|August 24|en|August 24|qid=Q2825|lt=August 24|1=August 24}} , {{ill|1101|en|1101|qid=Q12053|lt=1101|1=1101}} ) – {{ill|Su Shi|en|Su Shi|qid=Q36020|lt=Su Shi|1=Su Shi}} , {{ill|Northern Song|ja|北宋|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Northern Song|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=Northern Song (960–1127)|qid=Q319460}} literati and politician (b. {{ill|1036|en|1036|qid=Q19328|lt=1036|1=1036}} ). * Year 1 of {{ill|Hōgen (era)|en|Hōgen (era)|qid=Q1193898|lt=Hōgen (era)|1=Hōgen (era)}} (Julian calendar {{ill|August 15|en|August 15|qid=Q2774|lt=August 15|1=August 15}} , {{ill|1156|en|1156|qid=Q19653|lt=1156|1=1156}} ) – {{ill|Taira no Tadamasu|ja|平忠正|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taira no Tadamasu|1=Taira no Tadamasa|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11482780}} , samurai and uncle of [[Taira no Kiyomori]]{{citation needed |Taira no Kiyomori|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taira no Kiyomori|qq=}} (birth year unknown). * Year 1 of {{ill|Eiman|en|Eiman|qid=Q1193868|lt=Eiman|1=Eiman}} (Julian calendar {{ill|September 5|en|September 5|qid=Q2854|lt=September 5|1=September 5}} , {{ill|1165|en|1165|qid=Q19676|lt=1165|1=1165}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Nijō|en|Emperor Nijō|qid=Q440149|lt=Emperor Nijō|1=Emperor Nijō}} , 78th emperor of Japan (b. {{ill|1143|en|1143|qid=Q19617|lt=1143|1=1143}} ). * Year 1 of {{ill|Genki (era)|1=Genki (era)|2=ja|3=元亀|qid=Q1145064|lt=Genki Era|ja|Genki (era)|1=Genki (era)|2=ja|3=元亀|qid=Q1145064|lt=Genki Era|Genki|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Genki (era)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q1145064}} (Julian calendar {{ill|August 29|en|August 29|qid=Q2816|lt=August 29|1=August 29}} , {{ill|1570|en|1570|qid=Q6659|lt=1570|1=1570}} ) – {{ill|Lady Sanjō|en|Lady Sanjō|qid=Q422018|lt=Lady Sanjō|1=Lady Sanjō}} , wife of [[Takeda Shingen]]{{efn|Japanese feudal lord (1521–1573)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takeda Shingen|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (b. {{ill|1521|en|1521|qid=Q6288|lt=1521|1=1521}} ). * Year 14 of {{ill|Kyōhō|en|Kyōhō|qid=Q1145048|lt=Kyōhō|1=Kyōhō}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|August 22|en|August 22|qid=Q2828|lt=August 22|1=August 22}} , {{ill|1729|en|1729|qid=Q6952|lt=1729|1=1729}} ) – {{ill|Torii Kiyonobu I|en|Torii Kiyonobu I|qid=Q3179022|lt=Torii Kiyonobu I|1=Torii Kiyonobu I}} , {{ill|Ukiyo-e|en|Ukiyo-e|qid=Q185905|lt=ukiyo-e|1=Ukiyo-e}} artist (b. {{ill|1664|en|1664|qid=Q7581|lt=1664|1=1664}} ).
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|7|27|7|29|6|28|8|7|0728|qq=}}
